description: Preparations for the First Rover Traverse

tokens: Hey, Jim, before you go back (in the cabin), get the
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: ...and, I want to get you dusted off.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yeah, I don't want to take all that dirt into the LM.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Where are you on your timeline, Dave?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Anytime you want to ingress, I'm ready for you.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, you brush me off; I'll go in.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I want you to get my antenna, too, before I go in.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: My harness is still secure, isn't it?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah, harness is fine, except for the dirt.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, Dave, this might be a good time to button up the corner of Jim's PLSS there.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: It's all buttoned; I got that a little while ago, Joe, (at
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, for your thinking, we're down about 25 minutes, but no problem.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay; I guess we expected that.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Hold the brush a minute and stand there.
(Pause) It (Jim's tool harness) did come off.
Try and get as much (dust off) as we can.
(Pause) It'll help if you kick your feet when you go in, because a lot of the stuff will come off.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Can you bend over a tad?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay; I think I got the major portion of it, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, you want to stow my antenna?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah...Oh, let me get your front here.
(Pause) Boy, working on this slope is another game, isn't it?
(Long Pause as Dave stows Jim's OPS antenna)
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, you'll stow the brush while I get in?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: While you're stowing the brush there, just thinking ahead; we've got a couple of checks to carry out on the Rover before you drive off from this site.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: We'll want you to look at the front wheel steering decoupling lanyard for us, and then after that, physically try to turn the front wheels for us.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Pause) Why would anybody put a snap there?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Noticing that the TV is pointed at him) Gee, you're watching me flounder around out here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay; the decoupling lanyard is taped down, Joe.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: You might physically try to turn the front wheel; if you think now is a good time.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I don't get much out of turning the front wheels.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay; I think we're in business.
We'll want 15 volts to Primary and Forward Steering to Bus A when you start off.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Now at his seat and sounding a little incredulous) What makes you think we're in business?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, we can get this later, when you're ready to go.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Looking at his checklist as he casually responds to Joe) Okay.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I got to transfer (EVA #1 Pallet as per CDR-7)...(Hearing Jim breathing heavily) How you doing, Jim?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Crossing the field-of-view, headed for the ladder, obviously concerned) Go easy; go easy!
(Pause) Stand by; let me come up there and watch you.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Swing your hips to the right.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: PLSS is catching on the...There you go, a little more...A little pushup there; put your stomach down.
Okay, get your right shoulder down.
That a boy; there you go.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Stuck on some...looks like Travono under there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I don't ever remember seeing that in the one-sixth-g training.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Take a little break up there, and let me pass you the pallet, okay?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay; let me get the ETB (probably means "LEC") up.
(Long Pause as Dave gets the pallet from the MESA)
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Sounding like he's struggling a bit) I'm ready, okay.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Not doing a thing, except hooking it up.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Long Pause as Dave turns the pallet over several times to free the LEC) Okay; now I'm ready, anytime you are.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Long Pause as Jim pulls the pallet up toward the cabin with the LEC) Give you a hand?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) That a boy, right over the step now.
There you go, it's over the step.
(Pause) You know, I tell you there's a lot better way to get that up.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Next time I'll carry it up the ladder to you.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Yeah, next time I'll just bring it up the ladder.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: While you're doing that...(To Houston) Anything else I can do on the Rover here, Joe?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Just press on, and we'll give you some more words when you're ready to drive off.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Long Pause as Dave returns to the bottom of the ladder and grabs the LEC) Got the pallet disconnected, Jim?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Disconnect the LEC (from the pallet), and let me pull it back down.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Long Pause as Dave brings the LEC hooks down)
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay; I'm going out to get the Nav initialized.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: This is Houston with a Rover procedure for you, as you get on.
We want the 15 Volts to Primary, and Forward Steering to Bus Alpha.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: First, let me stow the high gain and give you
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: So I'm going to turn you (that is, the TV) off.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Give me a comm check on
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: We're reading you 5 by on PM1/WB.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Joe, how do you read me in the LM?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay; I have the pallet unloaded.
I'm going to reconfigure the Comm circuit breakers (as per LMP-7).
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Give me a call on those (Rover) switches again.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: 15 Volts to Primary, Forward Steering to Bus Alpha.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Lost under Allen) Drive Power is Off...
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Now, we want you to rock the handcontroller full left and right, and watch the ammeter while you do that on the batteries.
And look for small deflections in those ammeter readings.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Pause) See, the only switches I have on now are 15 Volt DC Prime and Steering Forward Bus A.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Under Comm, TV is coming open.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, Dave; while you're getting configured there, we think both your batteries are okay.
There is something wrong with the forward steering and we'd like the Forward Steering switch to Off.
We still have good rear steering.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay, Forward Steering is Off, Joe.
I'm on a nice smooth area now.
Do you want to point any particular direction, or will you take this one?
Wait; I know where I'm going.
(Laughs) (Pause) It's hard to find a good smooth area with all the qualifications out here.
I'm at the Nav initialization site here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) Okay, Nav circuit breaker's going closed.
LRV systems, if you want them.
(Do you want) the readouts on the LRV again, Joe, or are you happy with what you got?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Dave, give us your Amp-hours again, please.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay; Amp-hours (remaining), 105 on (battery) number 1 and...I'm sorry, 110 on number 1 and 115 on number 2.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, and attitudes, if you're ready to copy.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I'm in System Reset, and we're driving down to zero.
And the Sun Shadow Device is at zero.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) And, Dave, you're going to be close to 279 on your heading, and I'll fine tune that in a minute.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay; well, I'll stand by; the System Reset's still driving.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) And, Jim, we'd like for you to take a breather here for a minute, while Dave's getting the Nav re-aligned.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: All I'd do is tidy the blanket.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Hey, Jim, try some of that fruit stick, it's really good.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Boy, I just had a couple of bites; it's really good.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (You might have a) little water(, too).
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, Dave, the fine-tuned heading is 279.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay, the MESA blankets are tidied, Joe.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Can you come and join me?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, let me get the switches off here so we don't have anybody drive off with it while we're gone.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) My flap (meaning the flap on Jim's PLSS that Dave tried to fasten earlier) never got fixed.
Got some core tube caps for me?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Oh, don't...Core tube caps didn't fit.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Counter to your right and I'll put it (an SCB) on.
(Long Pause) Okay; [SCB] bag number 4 is on the LMP.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: As a reminder before you climb on the Rover, you may want to go to
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: How do the PLSSs look to you down there, Joe?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: They're looking smooth as silk down here.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: And, Jim, if convenient now, you might give us an EMU status check.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay; I'm reading 3.85 (psi suit pressure); all flags are clear; and looks like 65 percent (oxygen).
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, Joe, and I'm reading 65 percent; all flags clear; and 3.85.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: By the way, little arrows on the heading indicator on the LRV Nav system work good.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: This thing's really bouncy when you get on.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: The foot's hooked on the tool there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) In fact, I can't...(Pause) (reach) down to the maps, let's see.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Can you get to the maps?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Careful you don't hit our jackrabbit switches there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: There's something wrong with my safety belt.
I'll get off and fix it.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Chuckling) As long as you're getting off, will you adjust mine?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) (Possibly looking at his own seatbelt) How did it get down there?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, we're standing by for a mark as you leave.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I got my trusty seat belt hooked under a Cannon plug that...A new surprise.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I think it (Jim's belt)'s too short, Dave, it...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Don't waste time on it; I'll just hang on.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (They both laugh) I think, once we get a couple of tries at getting on and getting off, why, (we'll) be able to do pretty good.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, I'm supposed to give a few readings here.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Are you ready to copy some readings, Joe?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) And forward motor temps are lower limit.
transcript.speaker: Irwin
